sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Applications 30 & 31 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.7, 9 & 25 2. For hearing of main case 06.10.2025 These reference applications are pending since 2020 without any progress; even notice has not been sought till date. On 02.11.2020 time was sought to reformulate questions of law, however, same is not being done and the applicant remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. In view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
